extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož attacked solo on the final climb to Chiroubles with 400m to go, winning by 14 seconds over SCHACHMANN.
tactical_patterns: BERNARD Julian attacked solo from early break on second Mont Brouilly ascent, showing Trek-Segafredo prioritizes stage hunting over GC support.
BENNETT George set tempo for Jumbo-Visma on first Mont Brouilly climb, revealing team's willingness to control despite Roglič not wearing leader's jersey.
VLASOV Aleksandr counterattacked after Roglič's move but lacked legs to sustain, suggesting GC contenders waited too long to respond within final 400m.

rider_signals.DOUBEY Fabien: negative: King of Mountains jersey holder cracked completely on first Mont Brouilly after successive days of breakaway efforts, nearly missing time cut
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: negative: struggled badly on second Mont Brouilly while teammates Bennett and Roglič dominated, suggesting Jumbo depth hierarchy clear
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: climbed with GC contenders and hunted bonus seconds despite sprinter profile, revealing improved climbing form
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: positive: finished sixth overall after midpoint, confirming Ventoux form from Tour de Provence wasn't one-off
